allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch [System.Net.WebException] { Write-Output "WebException: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.GetType\(\).Name\) — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -match "python" -or $_.ProcessName -match "python" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "python" } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)
